headline: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
summary: Valve's Steam Controller orders are facing extreme delays. New reservations now have estimated ship dates extending to late 2026 or 2027. Demand for the unique gamepad continues to outpace production capabilities.

headline: You can now use the Game Boy Camera with your phone
summary: The GB Operator accessory now adds support for the classic Game Boy Camera. Users can connect the retro camera directly to their iOS or Android phones. This integration allows for modern mobile use of the nostalgic device.

headline: HBO Max’s annual plans are 28 percent off right now
summary: HBO Max is offering a 28% discount on its annual subscription plans. The limited-time promotion runs until July 15, 2026. New and returning subscribers can save significantly by paying for a year upfront.

headline: Snap’s Specs look good on nobody
summary: Snap has released new AR smart glasses called Specs, hailed as technically impressive. Despite advanced features, the design is heavily criticized for being unflattering. The pricey eyewear retails for $2,195.

headline: The Hunger Games Deluxe Edition Books Are All on Sale Before Amazon Prime Day
summary: Deluxe edition books of The Hunger Games series are currently on sale. This discount is a pre-Amazon Prime Day 2026 promotion. Fans can purchase special editions at reduced prices.

headline: New Queer Movies I'm Watching In Theaters This Weekend
summary: A selection of new queer movies is highlighted for theatrical viewing this weekend. The article draws parallels to a 'Barbenheimer-type matchup' for LGBTQIA+ audiences. It offers recommendations for upcoming film experiences.

headline: The Rugged, Waterproof DJI Osmo Action 4 4K 120fps Action Camera Drops to $169
summary: The DJI Osmo Action 4 camera is now available for $169. This rugged, waterproof 4K 120fps action camera offers significant savings. It is positioned as a strong competitor to GoPro Hero models at a fraction of the cost.

headline: Score Up to 29% Off Dreame Robot Vacuums for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Dreame robot vacuums are being offered with discounts of up to 29%. This sale is part of the ongoing Amazon Prime Day promotions. Consumers can upgrade to smart cleaning technology for less.

headline: Burnham says his win in Makerfield by-election could be turning point
summary: Andy Burnham secured a victory in the Makerfield by-election. He defeated Reform UK with a lead of over 9,000 votes. Burnham suggests this win could represent a significant turning point.

headline: Scottish Conservatives win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
summary: The Scottish Conservatives have won a Westminster by-election, a first in over 50 years. They secured the seat in Aberdeen South. Separately, the SNP claimed victory in Arbroath and Broughty Ferry.

headline: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
summary: The US has announced the lifting of its naval blockade against Iran. Iran's supreme leader claims Donald Trump agreed to the deal due to 'desperation'. This move marks a critical development in US-Iran relations.

headline: What Iran and US get from deal and why both could struggle to keep it
summary: Analysts are examining the recently struck deal between the US and Iran. Both Washington and Tehran assert victory following the agreement. The article explores the potential benefits and challenges for both sides in maintaining the deal.
